categories.label: Ship Survived
categories.description: The ship's hull did not reach zero — the crew survived the voyage

categories.label: Scenario Objective Complete
categories.description: The main story objective was achieved

categories.label: Personal Story Complete
categories.description: Each player checks if they completed enough of their personal pirate story for a happy ending

win_condition: Cooperative: crew wins if the ship survives and the scenario objective is completed. Each player individually succeeds or fails their personal story.
